title: Add/update pytest verification for ccp_hop_vectors and ccp16-hop.json in test_vectors.py
description: Ensure test_vectors.py uses the new ccp_hop_vectors() for regeneration check and validates all hash_output against independent hash_32 oracle. Fix any test integrity issues (no code-under-test as oracle). Run pytest after. Reference wlgu.2.3.4 pattern.
